summary: Phase C: School Knowledge Base Migration - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 8 Playwright test steps passed (KB page load, 21 school cards, search, D1 filter, school detail, coaching staff, program info, add-to-pipeline).
critical_code_review_comments: athlete_knowledge.py: Search endpoint correctly returns all 21 schools with filter metadata (divisions, states, conferences, regions)
athlete_knowledge.py: All filters work correctly - division (D1/D2/D3/NAIA), state, conference, region, text search
athlete_knowledge.py: School detail endpoint returns full program data including coaching_staff, program_stats, in_pipeline flag
athlete_knowledge.py: add-to-pipeline correctly creates program document and seeds coaching staff as college_coaches
athlete_knowledge.py: Proper 403 enforcement - only athletes/parents can add to pipeline, directors/coaches blocked
SchoolsPage.js: Grid displays 21 school cards with division badges, stats, scholarship info, add/in-pipeline buttons
SchoolsPage.js: Search debounce (300ms) and filter dropdowns work correctly
SchoolDetailPage.js: Hero section, stats grid (8 stat boxes), coaching staff section, program info section all render correctly
SchoolDetailPage.js: 'In Pipeline' badge shows for schools already added, 'Add to Pipeline' button for new schools
seed_data_creation: Added Ohio State, Cal Lutheran, and Creighton to Emma's pipeline during testing. KB has 21 volleyball programs (14 D1, 3 D2, 3 D3, 1 NAIA).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C (Knowledge Base Migration) fully verified. KB endpoints: GET /api/athlete/knowledge/search (with q, division, state, conference, region filters), GET /api/athlete/knowledge/{domain} (school detail with in_pipeline flag), POST /api/athlete/knowledge/{domain}/add-to-pipeline (creates program + college_coaches). Frontend routes: /schools (KB browse page), /schools/:domain (school detail). 21 schools seeded from seed_kb.py. Emma has 8+ schools in pipeline after testing (Stanford, Florida, UCLA, Tampa, Emory, BYU, Cal Lutheran, Creighton, Ohio State).

backend.test_search_returns_all_schools: PASS - Returns 21 schools with filter metadata
backend.test_filter_by_state: PASS - CA filter returns Stanford, USC, Cal Lutheran, CMS
backend.test_multiple_filters_combined: PASS - D1 + Midwest combined filter works
backend.test_get_school_detail_stanford: PASS - Full school detail with coaching_staff, program_stats

frontend.test_school_detail_page: PASS - Stanford detail shows all sections
frontend.test_coaching_staff_section: PASS - Kevin Hambly, Jillian Goodman displayed
frontend.test_stats_grid: PASS - 8 stat boxes (Championships, Record, Roster, etc.)
frontend.test_add_to_pipeline: PASS - Ohio State added, green toast shown
